name: dryft
description: A feature map and MCP pre-edit controller for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Pre-edit feature map for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Dryft gives AI coding agents a structured, queryable view of your codebase's features. Agents call MCP tools to plan changes against dryft.yml before editing instead of inventing a new naming convention every session.
defaultPrompt: Before editing files, ask Dryft to plan the change against the feature map.
List the features in this codebase using Dryft.
